\tzpentry{ID4437}{Time Complexity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4437 introduces Time Complexity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \text{Time Complexity}=O(n\cdot k_{\max}\cdot\log\frac{n}{\epsilon}) \]
